name: Etma
description_short: ETMA Federal Credit Union is a small military-focused federal credit union headquartered in Louisville, TN with $29M in assets and 1,502 members serving primarily military-affiliated borrowers.
description_long:
ETMA Federal Credit Union was established in 1956 and has operated for 70 years as a member-owned financial cooperative. The credit union is headquartered in Louisville, Tennessee, with a single branch location at 1828 Airbase Road. It holds a federal charter (Charter Number 11152) and maintains membership primarily composed of military-affiliated individuals, reflecting its common bond membership structure.

The credit union offers standard consumer banking services including checking and savings accounts, ATM/debit card programs, and various loan products. Their asset portfolio reflects a diversified lending approach with $10.1M in real estate loans, $8.1M in other loans, and $1.1M in unsecured loans. The institution maintains $24.96M in member deposits across share drafts, regular shares, and other deposit products, demonstrating solid member confidence.

ETMA distinguishes itself as a smaller, specialized credit union serving a military community rather than a broad consumer base. With only 6 full and part-time employees managing 1,502 members, the organization maintains a lean operational structure. The credit union is FHLB (Federal Home Loan Bank) member and maintains low-cost wire transfer capabilities. Their most recent audit date of June 1, 2025, indicates current regulatory compliance.

As a small credit union, ETMA's scale presents both advantages and limitations. The institution generated $417,585 in net income with reasonable operational efficiency, but the single branch location and limited staff constrain service availability and product breadth compared to larger institutions. Member-only access and military-focused common bond eligibility requirements restrict who can join, though this specialized focus may strengthen community ties.
services: Loan and deposit services for military-affiliated members
pros: Federal credit union with 70-year operating history and NCUA insurance protection for deposits
Military-focused mission serving a defined community with aligned values and shared common bond
Solid capital position with $3.86M in equity and positive net income of $417,585
FHLB member status enabling mortgage products and specialized lending capabilities
Low-cost wire transfer services available to members
Reasonable loan portfolio diversification across real estate, unsecured, and other loan categories
Current regulatory compliance with audit dated June 1, 2025
cons: Single branch location in Louisville, TN limits physical access for non-local members
Military-affiliated common bond membership requirement restricts eligibility for general public
Very small institution ($29M assets) with only 6 employees limits product variety and service hours
No investment products offered (zero investments listed in assets) compared to larger credit unions
Limited online presence and digital service information available on website
best_for: Military-affiliated individuals and their families seeking community-focused banking
Existing members in or near Louisville, Tennessee requiring basic banking services
Borrowers seeking military-community focused lending with personal relationship banking
Members valuing credit union ownership structure and member-governance principles
diagnosis: ETMA Federal Credit Union is best suited for military-affiliated individuals in or near Louisville, Tennessee who value community-focused banking and member ownership. The main caveat is the single physical branch location and military-only membership eligibility, which severely limit accessibility and reach for non-military consumers outside the immediate area.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
